item.title: 债券暴跌，伊朗战争加剧通胀风险
item.description:
油价飙升促使交易员削减对宽松货币政策的押注。

【原文：

Oil price surge is prompting traders to scale back bets on easier monetary policy. 

】

item.title: PitchBook称SpaceX 1.75万亿美元估值"合理"
item.description: 据PitchBook分析师称，亿万富翁埃隆·马斯克旗下的SpaceX公司首次公开募股（IPO）估值达到1.75万亿美元是"合理的"。【原文：A $1.75 trillion valuation for billionaire Elon Musk’s SpaceX in an initial public offering would be “justifiable,” according to a PitchBook analyst.】

item.title: 交易员开始为本月南非加息布局
item.description: 利率交易员开始将南非本月晚些时候加息的可能性纳入定价考量，因伊朗冲突推高油价，引发通胀担忧再度升温。【原文：Interest-rate traders moved to price in a chance of a South African interest-rate hike later this month as the Iran conflict pushed oil prices higher, reviving concerns about inflation.】

item.title: 埃及镑跌破关键关口 中东冲突持续升级
item.description: 埃及镑兑美元汇率跌破50关口，显示出投资者对中东冲突可能长期化的担忧。【原文：Egypt’s pound weakened past the milestone of 50 per dollar, demonstrating investors’ fears over the prospect of a prolonged conflict in the Middle East.】

item.title: MMG利润因铜价上涨和矿山产量强劲增长而翻三番
item.description: MMG有限公司表示，受大宗商品价格上涨和主要矿山产量强劲推动，去年利润增长逾三倍，但仍低于分析师预期。【原文：MMG Ltd. said profit more than tripled last year, buoyed by higher commodity prices and strong output at key mines, though still fell short of analyst estimates.】

item.title: 摩根大通称欧洲银行股中东抛售已过度
item.description: 摩根大通分析师认为，欧洲投资银行因中东地缘政治紧张局势而抛售股票的行为似乎有些过度。【原文：European investment banks’ selloff on geopolitical tensions in the Middle East looks excessive, according to analysts at JPMorgan Chase & Co.】

item.title: 华尔街多头信心不移，坚称2026年将迎来行情
item.description: 今年开局两个月，标普500指数基本原地踏步。考虑到市场经历的种种冲击——从地缘政治动荡到人工智能颠覆性威胁——这倒也情有可原。【原文：Two months into the year, the S&P 500 Index has gone nowhere. That’s not a huge knock, given the shocks markets have endured, from geopolitical unrest to AI disruption threats.】

item.title: 布伦特原油溢价较中东原油基准价飙升至2022年以来最高水平
item.description: 布伦特原油期货较中东迪拜基准油价的溢价已创2022年以来新高，此前因美国和以色列对伊朗发动袭击，全球原油基准价格大幅上涨。【原文：Brent futures are trading at the biggest premium to the Middle Eastern Dubai marker since 2022, after the global crude benchmark surged following attacks on Iran by the US and Israel.】

item.title: 印度天然气进口商开始削减对工业客户的供应
item.description: 卡塔尔关闭全球最大液化天然气出口设施后，印度液化天然气买家开始削减对工业客户的供应，以应对可能出现的短缺。【原文：Indian liquefied natural gas buyers are starting to cut supply to industrial customers in anticipation of shortages after Qatar halted the world’s largest export facility.】

item.title: 英国罗斯班克出售股份为30亿美元美国交易筹资
item.description: 罗斯班克工业公司计划斥资30.5亿美元收购两家美国特种制造企业，并通过股权市场融资以支持此次交易。【原文：Rosebank Industries Plc plans to buy two specialty manufacturing companies in the US for $3.05 billion, tapping equity markets to help fund the deal.】

item.title: 波斯湾油轮短缺或将影响石油产量
item.description: 波斯湾地区仅剩寥寥数艘超级油轮可供租赁，这可能引发物流危机，迫使该石油富集区减产，进而导致全球供应短缺。【原文：Just a handful of supertankers are still available for hire in the Persian Gulf, risking a logistical crisis that could force production shut-ins in the oil-rich region and lead to a global supply crunch.】

item.title: 美国国债延续跌势，伊朗战争加剧全球债券抛售潮
item.description: 美国国债跟随其他债券市场走低，交易员们撤回了对降息的押注，以应对伊朗战争升级可能带来的通胀影响。【原文：US Treasuries followed other bond markets lower, with traders retreating from bets for interest-rate cuts in response to the potentially inflationary impact of an escalating Iran war.】

item.title: 欧元区通胀意外加速，伊朗风险阴云密布
item.description: 欧元区通胀意外加速，这支持了欧洲央行在利率问题上的谨慎态度，尤其是在伊朗战争导致能源价格飙升的背景下。【原文：Euro-area inflation unexpectedly quickened, backing the European Central Bank’s caution on interest rates, particularly as the war in Iran sends energy prices surging.】

item.title: 研究发现：人工智能数据中心可能无需持续峰值电力
item.description: 英国一项试验结果表明，人工智能数据中心无需持续使用峰值电力即可运行，这一发现可能对全球电力系统产生深远影响。【原文：AI data centers can operate without using peak power continuously, according to the results of a UK trial, a finding that could have implications for electricity systems worldwide.】

item.title: 沃什的降息之路在抵达美联储前已日趋艰难
item.description: 凯文·沃什距离接掌美联储尚有数月之遥，但随着美国经济及其未来同僚们转向相反方向，他能否实现特朗普总统所期待的降息目标正面临阻碍。【原文：Kevin Warsh is still months away from taking the helm at the Federal Reserve, but his ability to deliver the interest-rate cuts President Donald Trump expects is facing hurdles as the US economy, and his future colleagues, tilt in the opposite direction.】

item.title: 迪拜的空客A380超级巨无霸客机机队散布于全球各地
item.description: 由于中东空域对民航仍基本关闭，阿联酋航空旗下空客A380超级巨无霸客机机队被迫分散停泊全球各地，凸显出伊朗战争造成的运营中断以及恢复常规航班面临的后勤难题。【原文：With airspace in the Middle East still largely closed for civil aviation, Emirates has found its fleet of Airbus SE A380 superjumbos scattered across the globe, highlighting the disruption wrought by the war in Iran and the logistical complications to resume regular service.】

item.title: 亚洲交易商寻求硫磺期权，霍尔木兹海峡停运削减供应
item.description: 亚洲干硫磺贸易商正争相寻找替代供应，以填补中东地区因冲突升级而受阻的货源缺口。这场日益激烈的地区冲突正威胁着这种化肥和镍加工原料的供应渠道。【原文：Asia-based traders of dry sulfur are rushing to substitute supplies stranded in the Middle East as an intensifying regional conflict threatens access to the chemical used in fertilizer and nickel processing.】

item.title: 据称Vnet与TikTok母公司字节跳动达成数据中心合作协议
item.description: 知情人士透露，Vnet集团已获得创纪录订单，将为抖音母公司字节跳动有限公司提供约500兆瓦的电力容量，这些电力将来自其位于中国的数据中心。【原文：Vnet Group Inc. has secured a record order to supply TikTok owner ByteDance Ltd. with about 500 megawatts of capacity from its data centers in China, according to people familiar with the situation.】

item.title: 据称MNRB获准启动伊斯兰保险公司Takaful Ikhlas出售谈判
item.description: 据知情人士透露，马来西亚央行已批准MNRB控股公司就出售其伊斯兰保险子公司Takaful Ikhlas启动谈判。【原文：Malaysia’s central bank has approved the start of talks for MNRB Holdings Bhd. to sell its Islamic insurance unit Takaful Ikhlas, according to people with knowledge of the matter.】

item.title: 印尼石化巨头因伊朗战争宣布不可抗力
item.description: 印尼石化企业PT Chandra Asri Pacific宣布不可抗力，称因伊朗战争爆发导致霍尔木兹海峡原料运输中断。【原文：Indonesian petrochemical maker PT Chandra Asri Pacific has declared force majeure, citing disruption to feedstock shipments through the Strait of Hormuz following the outbreak of the Iran war.】

item.title: 欧洲以推迟美欧贸易协议考验特朗普的短 fuse
item.description: 欧盟正挑战特朗普总统在贸易问题上的耐心，其内部关于是否批准七个月前敲定的协议以及批准时间的争论，可能导致关税水平高于此前谈判结果。【原文：The European Union is challenging President Donald Trump’s patience on trade, risking higher tariffs than previously negotiated as it debates if and when to approve a deal the two sides hammered out seven months ago.】

item.title: 克虏伯·纳格尔裁员逾2000人，物流产能过剩加剧
item.description: 克虏伯国际集团计划裁减逾2000个岗位，以应对运输市场产能过剩问题。与此同时，伊朗战争使全球货运前景更难预测。【原文：Kuehne + Nagel International AG plans to cut more than 2,000 jobs, as it tackles a glut of capacity in the transportation market, even as the war on Iran makes the global cargo outlook more unpredictable.】

item.title: 新兴市场资产延续跌势，通胀风险被市场消化
item.description: 新兴市场资产延续跌势，因伊朗战争持续阻碍关键全球能源运输，推高美元汇率，并迫使投资者调整以应对全球通胀加剧的风险。【原文：Emerging-market assets extended losses as the war in Iran continued to impede key global energy shipments, lift the dollar and force investors to adjust to the risks of higher inflation across the world.】

item.title: 软银300亿美元押注OpenAI，致标普下调其信用展望
item.description: 标普全球公司将软银集团的评级展望从稳定下调至负面，称其计划对OpenAI追加300亿美元投资可能损害这家日本企业的流动性及其资产的信用质量。【原文：S&P Global Inc. lowered its outlook for SoftBank Group Corp. to negative from stable, saying plans for an additional $30 billion investment in OpenAI may hurt the Japanese company’s liquidity and the credit quality of its assets.】

item.title: 欧洲债券市场仅向最安全的借款人重开大门
item.description: 周二，少数最安全的借款人正引领欧洲一级市场发行谨慎重启，而中东持续的冲突则令风险指标飙升。【原文：A handful of some of the safest borrowers are leading a tentative restarting of primary issuance in Europe on Tuesday, as ongoing conflict in the Middle East sends risk gauges surging.】

item.title: 土耳其考虑恢复燃油税缓冲机制，因伊朗战争导致油价飙升
item.description: 据知情人士透露，随着伊朗战争推高原油价格，土耳其正评估是否重启一项旨在缓解消费者油价上涨压力的燃油税机制。【原文：Turkey is assessing whether to revive a fuel tax mechanism aimed at cushioning consumers from rising oil prices as war in Iran drives up crude, according to people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 欧元债券下跌，交易员权衡欧洲央行加息与能源价格飙升
item.description: 欧洲债券跌势扩大，交易员正评估中东冲突可能长期化的风险。欧洲央行首席经济学家此前警告称，这种局面将引发滞胀。【原文：European bonds extended losses as traders weighed the possibility of a prolonged conflict in the Middle East, a scenario the European Central Bank’s chief economist warned would be stagflationary.】

item.title: 非洲最大食品杂货商Shoprite在市场份额竞争中利润率收窄
item.description: 非洲最大的连锁超市通过压低价格来争取市场份额。【原文：Africa’s largest supermarket chain held prices lower in an attempt to win market share.】

item.title: 海湾动荡助推韩国军工企业股价飙升20%创历史新高
item.description: 韩国营收规模最大的军工企业高管明确阐述了该公司深化中东业务布局的理由：威胁四伏。【原文：A top executive at South Korea’s biggest arms-maker by revenue made a clear case for the company’s deepening foray into the Middle East: Threats abound.】

item.title: 银行呼吁英国国库券豁免杠杆规则
item.description: 银行正敦促英国官员将英国国库券排除在关键监管资本指标之外，以助力该国扩大市场规模。【原文：Banks are asking British officials to exempt the UK’s Treasury bills from a key regulatory capital metric to help the nation expand the market.】
